function.name: search_knowledge
function.description: Search the Gatewise product knowledge base for answers about features, plans, setup, and troubleshooting. Call this BEFORE answering any question about how Gatewise works. Returns grounded passages, or NO_MATCH if nothing relevant is found.

query.description: The caller's question rephrased as a concise search query.

function.name: create_ticket
function.description: Open a support ticket. Use when the issue needs human follow-up, when it is a P1 (auth outage affecting all users, or a security issue), or when the caller asks for a human.

description.description: What the caller reported, in one or two sentences.

customer.description: Caller name or organization, if known.

function.name: lookup_ticket
function.description: Look up the status of an existing support ticket by its number.

ticket_id.description: The ticket number the caller provides.
